issues.description: Action type is SearchDeck but effect searches trash, not deck. Should be a custom trash-search action or equivalent.
Filter missing type constraints: must match {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} OR {Thriller Bark Pirates}. Current filter only checks cost.
Filter missing exclusion: [Gecko Moria] must be excluded from valid targets.
Missing quantity limit: effect states 'up to 1' but DSL does not specify maxCount or quantity constraint.

types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
